[ COPYING & UI LABELS ]

Double-click on any label (filename, path, etc.) -> Copy to clipboard with visual feedback
Double-click on audio filename -> Copy filename to clipboard
Double-click on audio path -> Copy folder path to clipboard
Double-click on timer -> Copy current timestamp in LRC format [mm:ss.xx]


[ COVER ART ]

Double-click on cover art -> Save cover as an image file
Ctrl + Click on cover art -> Open full-size image in default viewer


[ LYRICS & EDITING ]

Press Enter in ORIGINAL lyrics column -> Creates a new line with the current playback time
Click on line number in the gutter (left side) -> Jump to that timestamp
Shift + Mouse Wheel on lyrics -> Scroll line by line (fast navigation)
Triple right-click on any lyrics column -> Clear the entire column


[ PLAYBACK & SEEKING ]

Ctrl + Mouse Wheel -> Seek by +/- 0.1 seconds
Ctrl + Scroll on seek bar area -> Fine seeking
Mouse Wheel inside Local Offset panel -> Controls playback (seek)


[ SYNC FROM SCRATCH MODE (Ctrl+E) ]

Enter / Space -> Stamps the current playback time onto the active line and auto-advances.
A / Left Arrow -> Jumps to the previous line AND seeks the audio track to that line's timestamp.
D / Right Arrow -> Jumps to the next line AND seeks the audio track to that line's timestamp.
Z / Up Arrow -> Jumps to the previous line WITHOUT changing the current audio playback time.
C / Down Arrow -> Jumps to the next line WITHOUT changing the current audio playback time.
Shift + Mouse Wheel -> Shifts the global track playback time continuously by 1-second intervals.
Double-click on a line -> Immediately seeks audio playback directly to that line's embedded timestamp.
